name: Life Cycle Maintenance Cost Calculator
description: Calculates total life cycle maintenance cost based on industrial engineering standards (ISO 15686, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Acquisition Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total initial cost of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total initial cost of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).

inputs.label: Expected Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Planned useful life of the asset per ISO 15686.

businessContext_i18n.en: Planned useful life of the asset per ISO 15686.

inputs.label: Maintenance Strategy
inputs.businessContext: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly cost of maintenance labor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly cost of maintenance labor.

inputs.label: Parts Cost per Incident
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of spare parts per maintenance event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of spare parts per maintenance event.

inputs.label: Downtime Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost revenue or cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost revenue or cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

inputs.label: Power Rating (kW)
inputs.businessContext: Rated power consumption of the asset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated power consumption of the asset.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inflation rate for future cost adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inflation rate for future cost adjustments.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate for net present value calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount rate for net present value calculations.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy (0-100%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Confidence level in input data accuracy (0-100%).

rules.message: Expected life must be greater than 0 years.
Annual operating hours must be between 0 and 8760.
Data confidence must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Total maintenance cost exceeds 50% of acquisition cost. Consider asset replacement or strategy review.
Downtime cost exceeds 30% of total life cycle cost. Investigate reliability improvements.
Data confidence is low. Results may be unreliable. Consider data validation.
